message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Change Order Status to "Being Delivered"

actor SalesClerk as clerk
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI" as UI
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController" as Controller
participant "ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService" as Service
participant "OrderRepository" as Repository
participant "ChangeToBeingDeliveredService" as ChangeService

clerk -> UI: 1 Update the status of dispatched orders to "Being delivered" for customer delivery.
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 2 orderDispatched()
activate Controller
Controller --x Service: 3 orderDispatched()
deactivate Controller
Service -> Repository: 4 orderDispatched()
activate Repository
Repository --x UI: 5 ordersDispatched
deactivate Repository
deactivate UI
UI --x clerk: 6 Shows all the orders that are dispatched.
UI --x clerk: 7 Asks to choose one of the orders
clerk -> UI: 8 Selects the order he wants to change status
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 9 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
activate Controller
Controller -> ChangeService: 10 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
activate ChangeService
ChangeService --x Repository: 11 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
deactivate ChangeService
Repository --x UI: 12 Successful change
deactivate Repository
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
UI --x clerk: 13 Informs that is changed

@enduml
```
